headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Intel (INTC) After A 140% Year To Date Surge

Intel's share price recently closed at US$94.48, alongside returns of 14.5% over 7 days, 96.7% over 30 days, 139.9% year to date, 358.2% over 1 year, 211.1% over 3 years, and 79.0% over 5 years.
